overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval village on an overcast autumn day. The character navigates from narrow timber-lined alleys through a stone gate and across a wooden river bridge, passing various NPC villagers and armored guards.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone alley between timber-framed houses

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the narrow village alley

notable_agents.action: villager in brown clothing walking past Geralt in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall timber-framed medieval house with dark wooden beams
timber-framed building with wooden cart parked beside it
wooden wheeled cart with weathered planks
stone foundation wall of the building on the left

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow cobblestone alley flanked by timber-framed medieval houses. A wooden cart sits on the right side while villagers walk in the opposite direction, and the stone base of the left building runs along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: village street approaching stone gate with market stalls

events.description: approaching the large stone gate archway that marks the village exit

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing through the village street toward the gate

notable_agents.action: group of villagers walking ahead toward the stone gate

entered.detail: large stone archway forming the main village gate with heavy wooden doors
burning campfire with smoke rising near the gate entrance
wooden market stall with canvas roof and goods displayed

segments.scene_description: The alley opens into a wider village street with a prominent stone gate visible ahead. A campfire burns on the right near a wooden market stall, while more villagers populate the area walking toward the gate. The wooden cart from the previous alley disappears behind as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone gate tunnel passage with guards

events.description: entering the shadowed stone archway tunnel, light drops significantly
exiting the gate to reveal the river and waterfront buildings

agents.ego_description: Geralt passing through the guarded gate tunnel

notable_agents.action: armored guard in red standing watch against the stone wall

entered.detail: dark stone tunnel with arched ceiling and rough masonry walls
thick rough-hewn stone wall of the gate structure

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through the shadowed stone gate tunnel where lighting drops significantly and an armored guard stands watch. The timber houses and campfire disappear behind as the character moves deeper into the archway before emerging to see the river ahead.

events.description: stepping onto the wooden bridge over the calm river water

agents.ego_description: Geralt crossing the long wooden bridge over the river

notable_agents.action: group of soldiers with weapons walking ahead on the bridge

entered.detail: long wooden bridge with railings spanning the river
calm river water flowing beneath the bridge
wooden house with thatched roof on the opposite river bank

segments.scene_description: Exiting the gate, Geralt steps onto a long wooden bridge over a calm river. Soldiers walk ahead in the distance while timber houses line the far bank under the overcast sky, and the stone gate recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village outskirts with dirt paths and wooden fences

events.description: leaving the wooden bridge onto dirt ground in the outskirts

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the open village outskirts

entered.detail: muddy dirt path leading through the rural outskirts
simple wooden fence lining the left side of the path
wooden directional signpost at the crossroads

segments.scene_description: After crossing the bridge, the scene opens into a rural outskirts area with dirt paths and simple wooden fences. A wooden signpost marks the crossroads while the river and bridge disappear behind, and the environment feels more open than the village center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped medieval alleyway through a stone gateway toward an open river view. It begins with Geralt navigating a narrow cobblestone path flanked by timber-framed houses and a stationary wooden cart as villagers pass by. As the alley opens into a wider village street, the scene expands to reveal a burning campfire and market stalls before the camera advances toward a prominent stone gate. The environment then shifts into the deep shadows of the gate's tunnel, where the light drops significantly and an armored guard stands watch. Finally, the camera emerges from the dark archway, leaving the village houses behind to reveal the river ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt transitions from the confined architecture of a village gate to the open expanse of the rural outskirts. It begins with the character stepping onto a long wooden bridge over a calm river, leaving the stone gate behind while soldiers walk in the distance under an overcast sky. As he crosses the bridge, the view of the timber houses on the far bank gives way to a wider landscape. The scene then opens into a rustic area of dirt paths and simple wooden fences, with the river and bridge receding into the background. Finally, the camera follows him toward a wooden signpost marking a crossroads in the open countryside.
